calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2009 Off Calendar

Hearing Re: Further Orders.
Off Calendar May-07-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day further hearing and submission of amended judgment.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Marc Libarle, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Jennifer Seidman, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Patrick Kilgallen.
Judgment was entered on April 2, 2009.
Binding Arbitration Award was filed on April 30, 2009.

Good cause appearing, the Court Ordered that the judgment be amended as follows:

(1) Richard B. Cole shall be appointed Receiver to effect the transfer of Liquor License No. 48-433914.
(2) The parties are Ordered to comply with the Binding Arbitration Award filed on April 30, 2009, which establishes the rights and obligations of each party to this action with respect to the Acme Bar.
(3) Patrick Kilgallen is released from the lease for the Acme Bar, located at 2115 San Pablo Avenue, Berkeley, CA.

Amended Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-02-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Marc L. Libarle, Esq. appeared with for plaintiff Jennifer Seidman, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Patrick Kilgallen.
Default was entered against defendant on January 20, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed today, April 2, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Jennifer Seidman, and against the Defaulted Defendant Patrick Kilgallen as follows:

The partnership dated December 19, 2001 between the parties is dissolved. An arbitrator shall be chosen from the San Francisco Superior Court arbitration panel, or the Law Offices of Guy Kornblum, or the Law Offices of Philip A. Segal, and the arbitrator shall conduct a binding arbritration, and issue an order and judgment establishing the rights and obligations of each party with respect to the Acme Bar and Liquor license no. 48-433914.

The arbitrator shall any and all necessary orders required by the California Department of Alcohol Beverage Control. The Court further Orders that ABC 211-A and Form 238 be executed.

Matter is continued to May 7, 2009 @ 9:00 a.m. for hearing re; Further Orders.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order
Off Calendar Dec-23-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Marc Libarle (928.2400) for plaintiff and moving party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF JENNIFER SEIDMAN'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
